message:
audit: blocking_pool + io_driver + bulkhead — all SOUND (bd-1iobq, bd-veqqh, bd-1ewqf)

- blocking_pool.rs (1,329 LOC): Parker pattern, CAS thread management, catch_unwind
- io_driver.rs (1,282 LOC): split-lock turn_with, RAII IoRegistration, generational tokens
- bulkhead.rs (1,335 LOC): TOCTOU fix verified, lock ordering queue→metrics consistent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
